svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto">
      <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Basis and Dimension</text>
  
  <!-- Basis vectors -->
  <rect x="80" y="80" width="60" height="60" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="115" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    v₁
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="80" y="150" width="60" height="60" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="185" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    v₂
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Dimension label -->
  <rect x="280" y="115" width="100" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="330" y="140" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    dim = 2
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Spanning arrows -->
  <line x1="150" y1="95" x2="270" y2="115" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <line x1="150" y1="165" x2="270" y2="135" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- Vector space representation -->
  <rect x="200" y="60" width="160" height="150" fill="#64B5F6" fill-opacity="0.3" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="280" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Vector Space
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Labels -->
  <text x="110" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Basis Vectors
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Linear independence indicator -->
  <path d="M 60 110 C 40 90, 40 150, 60 170" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="40" y="140" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    LI
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
